channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260402)
item.description:
What's New

fix: passthrough rules now override browser address bar detection

Passthrough injection method (disable Vietnamese) was being ignored when

browser address bar was focused because hardcoded address bar detection

(Priority 0.5) returned before Window Title Rules (Priority 1.0).

Solution: Add Priority 0.45 check — pre-compute getMergedRuleResult()

and if the merged result is passthrough, return immediately before

address bar detection. The pre-computed result is reused at Priority 1.0

for zero performance overhead.

This preserves existing behavior for all other injection methods (.fast,

.slow, .selection) which correctly defer to address bar detection.

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
